transcript:
Agent: Thank you for calling Pain Management and Neurology Clinic. This is Sarah, how may I help you?
Caller: Hi, I need to schedule an initial consultation. I was referred by my primary care doctor.
Agent: I'd be happy to help you with that. Can I get your full name please?
Caller: Thomas Anderson.
Agent: And your date of birth, Thomas?
Caller: July 22, 1979.
Agent: Thank you. Do you have your insurance information handy?
Caller: Yes, I have Blue Cross PPO. My member ID is BCX-447291.
Agent: Great, let me note that down. And do you have the referral from your doctor?
Caller: Yes, they said they'd fax it over.
Agent: Perfect. Let me look at available appointments. We have openings at our Sacramento and Modesto locations. Which would be more convenient for you?
Caller: Sacramento would be better.
Agent: Okay, I have availability next Wednesday at 9:15 AM or the following Monday at 3 PM. Which works better?
Caller: Wednesday at 9:15 works.
Agent: Alright, Thomas, I'll get you set up. Please arrive 15 minutes early to fill out paperwork, and bring your insurance card and a photo ID. Is there anything else I can help with?
Caller: No, that covers it. Thanks, Sarah.
Agent: You're welcome! Have a wonderful day.
